steps.title: Spot the parallel structure
steps.content: The passage uses “not only...but also illuminate.” This parallel structure is the key signal—the blank verb should express a similar meaning to illuminate (to clarify or reveal).

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Discern (choice B) means to perceive or recognize; discern steps in evolution is to identify and clarify those steps, which parallels illuminate. The other choices—exploit (to use), prioritize (to rank), and yield (to produce)—don't express this clarifying meaning. That matches choice B — B is correct.
